- 修复自定义控制栏时随机播放和循环模式按钮误触发播放模式切换的问题
- 新增主页标题长按导航至根目录
- 重新设计长按倍速浮层，支持位置预览
- 启动画面主题现从已保存的偏好设置中加载

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fix shuffle and loop buttons incorrectly toggling playback mode during control customization
- Add long press on home title to navigate to root directory
- Redesign long press speed overlay with position preview
- Bootstrap splash screen theme from persisted preferences
